create-pdf-table-with-header.title: Create PDF Table with Header and Data Rows
create-pdf-table-with-header.description: Shows how to programmatically build a table, add header and data rows, and save the result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-into-pdf.title: Insert Table into Existing PDF Page
insert-table-into-pdf.description: Shows how to create a Table, populate it with header and data rows, and place it on a specified page of an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

auto-fit-table-columns-to-content.title: Auto‑Fit Table Columns to Content in PDF
auto-fit-table-columns-to-content.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table and automatically adjusting column widths to fit the cell contents using ColumnAdjustment.AutoFitToContent, with cross‑platform save handling.

set-table-autofitbehavior.title: Set Table AutoFitBehavior to AutoFitToPageWidth
set-table-autofitbehavior.description: Demonstrates how to set a table's AutoFitBehavior to stretch it across the page width.

insert-svg-image-into-table-cell.title: Insert SVG Image into a PDF Table Cell
insert-svg-image-into-table-cell.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a table, and embed an SVG image inside a table cell using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-html-in-table-cell.title: Embed HTML in a Table Cell
embed-html-in-table-cell.description: Shows how to add an HtmlFragment containing HTML markup to a table cell's paragraph collection and save the PDF.

insert-page-break-after-table-row.title: Insert Page Break After Table Row in PDF
insert-page-break-after-table-row.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a table, insert a page break after a specific row using a TextFragment containing a form‑feed character, and continue adding rows after the break.

render-table-on-new-pdf-page.title: Render Table on a New PDF Page
render-table-on-new-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a page, build a styled table with header and data rows, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-table-cells-colspan.title: Merge Table Cells Using ColSpan in Aspose.Pdf
merge-table-cells-colspan.description: Demonstrates how to merge three adjacent columns of a PDF table into a single cell by setting the Cell.ColSpan property, and shows basic table creation and styling with Aspose.Pdf.

merge-table-cells-using-rowspan.title: Merge Table Cells Vertically Using RowSpan
merge-table-cells-using-rowspan.description: Demonstrates how to set Cell.RowSpan to 2 in an Aspose.Pdf table to merge a cell with the cell directly below it.

set-cell-margins.title: Set Cell Margins in PDF Table
set-cell-margins.description: Demonstrates how to configure margins for a table cell using MarginInfo and assign it to the cell's Margin property.

set-default-cell-padding-for-pdf-table.title: Set Default Cell Padding for a PDF Table
set-default-cell-padding-for-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to define a default cell padding for an entire Aspose.Pdf Table by assigning a MarginInfo instance to Table.DefaultCellPadding, then adds rows and saves the document.

calculate-rendered-table-width.title: Calculate Rendered Table Width After Layout
calculate-rendered-table-width.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a table using Aspose.Pdf, force layout by saving to a stream, and obtain the rendered table width by parsing the ColumnWidths string or falling back to the page width.

import-datatable-into-pdf-table.title: Import DataTable into PDF Table
import-datatable-into-pdf-table.description: Shows how to populate an Aspose.Pdf.Table directly from an in‑memory DataTable using Table.ImportDataTable, with optional styling and cross‑platform save handling.

import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table.title: Import Filtered DataView into PDF Table
import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates creating a filtered DataView and importing it into an Aspose.Pdf Table with ImportDataView, then saving the PDF document.

import-datatable-into-pdf-table__v2.title: Import DataTable into PDF Table
import-datatable-into-pdf-table__v2.description: Creates a PDF document and fills a table with data from a DataTable (simulating a database query) using Table.ImportDataTable.

check-pdf-table-is-broken.title: Check if PDF Table Is Broken Across Pages
check-pdf-table-is-broken.description: Loads a PDF document, finds all tagged TableElement objects, and reports whether each table will be broken onto the next page using the TableElement.IsBroken property.

table-with-header-and-repeating-column.title: Create Table with Header Row and Repeating Column in PDF
table-with-header-and-repeating-column.description: Shows how to mark a table header row and the first column as repeating so they stay visible on each new page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-tables-from-pdf.title: Extract Tables from PDF using TableAbsorber
extract-tables-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate and extract tables, rows, cells, and their text fragments from a PDF document.

replace-existing-table-in-pdf.title: Replace an Existing Table in a PDF with a New Table
replace-existing-table-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate a table on a PDF page using TableAbsorber, create a new Table, and replace the original table while preserving its position.

remove-table-from-pdf.title: Remove a Table from a PDF using TableAbsorber
remove-table-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate tables on a PDF page with TableAbsorber and delete a specific table, then save the modified document.

remove-all-tables-from-pdf.title: Remove All Tables from a PDF Document
remove-all-tables-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF using TableAbsorber and delete each found table from the document.

batch-add-table-with-logo-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Table with Logo to PDFs
batch-add-table-with-logo-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, create a two‑column table containing a company logo and text, and insert the table at the top of each document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-replace-tables-in-multiple-pdfs.title: Batch Replace Tables in Multiple PDFs
batch-replace-tables-in-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to locate tables on each page of PDFs using TableAbsorber and replace them with a new table, processing all PDF files in a folder.

apply-different-autofit-behavior-to-tabl.title: Apply Different AutoFitBehavior Settings to Multiple PDF Tables
apply-different-autofit-behavior-to-tabl.description: Shows how to create several tables in a single PDF and apply distinct ColumnAdjustment settings (AutoFitToContent, AutoFitToWindow, Customized) with optional column width definitions.

set-table-cell-background-color.title: Set Table Cell Background Color in PDF
set-table-cell-background-color.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and apply a background color to a specific cell using the Cell.BackgroundColor property.

apply-solid-border-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Solid Border to a PDF Table
apply-solid-border-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document with a table and applying a solid black border around the entire table using Aspose.Pdf's Table.Border and BorderInfo properties.

insert-external-image-into-table-cell.title: Insert External Image into Table Cell in PDF
insert-external-image-into-table-cell.description: Shows how to load an external PNG image from a file and place it inside a PDF table cell using Aspose.Pdf's Image class.

insert-image-into-table-cell.title: Insert Image from Memory Stream into Table Cell
insert-image-into-table-cell.description: Demonstrates loading an image into a MemoryStream, creating an Aspose.Pdf Image object from the stream, and inserting it into a table cell within a PDF document.

add-text-with-font-to-table-cell.title: Add Text with Font and Size to Table Cell
add-text-with-font-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to insert a TextFragment with a specific font and size into a table cell, configuring the cell to honor the fragment's TextState and handling platform‑specific PDF saving.

add-centered-paragraph-cell.title: Add Centered Paragraph Inside Table Cell
add-centered-paragraph-cell.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a table cell, and inserting a paragraph with centered alignment inside that cell.

set-cell-vertical-alignment-middle.title: Set Cell Vertical Alignment to Middle in PDF Table
set-cell-vertical-alignment-middle.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table and setting a cell's vertical alignment to middle (center) using Aspose.Pdf.

center-align-table-in-pdf.title: Center Align Table in PDF
center-align-table-in-pdf.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its HorizontalAlignment to Center, and save the modified document.

offset-table-left-margin.title: Offset Table from Left Margin in PDF
offset-table-left-margin.description: Demonstrates how to offset a table from the left margin by setting Table.Margin.Left and saving the PDF with platform‑specific handling.

enable-table-splitting-across-pdf-pages.title: Enable Table Splitting Across PDF Pages
enable-table-splitting-across-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates setting Table.IsBroken to true so a table can continue onto subsequent pages when it exceeds the current page height.

disable-table-splitting-pdf.title: Disable Table Splitting in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
disable-table-splitting-pdf.description: Shows how to prevent a table from automatically breaking across pages by setting Table.IsBroken to false, and saves the resulting PDF.

add-table-with-remaining-page-space.title: Add Table Within Remaining Page Space
add-table-with-remaining-page-space.description: Demonstrates how to calculate the usable vertical space on a PDF page by subtracting margins and existing content, then conditionally add a table if it fits.

create-fixed-width-table.title: Create Fixed-Width Table in PDF
create-fixed-width-table.description: Shows how to add a table with a total width of 500 points to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and includes platform‑specific handling for saving the document.

set-table-width-80-percent.title: Set Table Width to 80% of Page Width
set-table-width-80-percent.description: Demonstrates how to define a table's width as a percentage of the page width using Aspose.Pdf, add a simple row and cell, and save the PDF document.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Table Using Column Mapping
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates importing a DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf.Table while reordering columns based on a dictionary mapping, including basic table styling and platform‑aware PDF saving.

import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table_.title: Import Filtered DataView into PDF Table
import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table_.description: Demonstrates how to filter rows in a DataView and import the resulting data into an Aspose.Pdf.Table placed on a PDF document.

populate-pdf-table-from-linq-query.title: Populate PDF Table from LINQ Query using Aspose.Pdf
populate-pdf-table-from-linq-query.description: Demonstrates converting a LINQ query result into a DataTable, importing it into an Aspose.Pdf Table, and saving the table in a PDF document with platform‑specific handling.

add-table-to-specific-pdf-page.title: Add Table to Specific PDF Page
add-table-to-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a table into a chosen page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-after-paragraph.title: Insert Table After Specific Paragraph in PDF
insert-table-after-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to locate a paragraph by its text, create a simple table, and insert the table immediately after the found paragraph in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-before-image.title: Insert Table Before an Image in PDF
insert-table-before-image.description: Shows how to locate an image on each PDF page and insert a table directly before that image using Aspose.Pdf.

create-repeating-table-header.title: Create Repeating Table Header in PDF
create-repeating-table-header.description: Shows how to build a tagged table, define a header row, and set it to repeat on each new page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-table-with-styled-header.title: Create PDF Table with Styled Header Row
create-pdf-table-with-styled-header.description: Shows how to build a tagged PDF table using Aspose.Pdf and apply a background color and bold font to the header cells.

pdf-table-alternating-row-colors.title: Create PDF Table with Alternating Row Colors
pdf-table-alternating-row-colors.description: Shows how to generate a PDF table using Aspose.Pdf and apply alternating background colors to rows by setting each cell's BackgroundColor based on the row index parity.

add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.title: Add Hyperlink to Table Cell in PDF
add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to insert a web hyperlink inside a table cell by creating a LinkAnnotation and attaching it to the cell's paragraph.

add-checkbox-in-table-cell.title: Add Checkbox Form Field Inside Table Cell
add-checkbox-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table and inserting a checkbox form field inside a table cell.

add-radio-button-group.title: Add Radio Button Group Inside a PDF Cell
add-radio-button-group.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a table cell and placing a radio button group with multiple options inside the cell.

export-pdf-table-structure-to-json.title: Export PDF Table Structure to JSON
export-pdf-table-structure-to-json.description: Shows how to traverse tagged table elements in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, collect table, row, and cell properties, and serialize the structure into a JSON file.

export-pdf-table-data-to-csv.title: Export PDF Table Data to CSV
export-pdf-table-data-to-csv.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing tables and save the extracted table data as a CSV file using Aspose.Pdf's ExcelSaveOptions.

serialize-table-to-xml.title: Serialize Table to XML with Aspose.Pdf
serialize-table-to-xml.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF table, populating it with data, and saving the entire document as an XML file using Aspose.Pdf, including platform‑specific handling for GDI+ dependencies.

create-pdf-table-from-xml.title: Create PDF Table from XML Definition
create-pdf-table-from-xml.description: Loads a table definition from an XML file, constructs an Aspose.Pdf Table with rows and cells, and saves the result as a PDF document.

count-tables-in-pdf-using-tableabsorber.title: Count Tables in PDF using TableAbsorber
count-tables-in-pdf-using-tableabsorber.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect and count tables in a PDF document.

extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.title: Extract Table Coordinates from PDF using TableAbsorber
extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, uses Aspose.Pdf.TableAbsorber to locate tables, and outputs the rectangle coordinates (LLX, LLY, URX, URY) for each found table.

extract-text-from-pdf-tables.title: Extract Text from PDF Tables Using TableAbsorber
extract-text-from-pdf-tables.description: Shows how to detect tables in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and read the concatenated text from each cell.

replace-text-in-table-cells-pdf.title: Replace Text in PDF Table Cells
replace-text-in-table-cells-pdf.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF with TableAbsorber, iterate through cells, and replace any text fragment containing a specific keyword.

remove-table-column.title: Remove Column from PDF Table
remove-table-column.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific column from a PDF table by removing the corresponding cells from each row.

insert-column-into-pdf-table.title: Insert Column into PDF Table
insert-column-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to add a new column to an existing table in a PDF by inserting a cell at a specific index in each row using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-table-columns-in-pdf.title: Reorder Table Columns in a PDF
reorder-table-columns-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to change the column order of a detected PDF table by extracting cell contents, creating a new table with the desired sequence, and replacing the original table.

adjust-table-column-widths-proportionall.title: Proportionally Set Table Column Widths in PDF
adjust-table-column-widths-proportionall.description: The example loads a PDF, creates a table, calculates each column's width as a percentage of the total table width, and applies those percentages using the ColumnWidths property before saving the document.

set-minimum-column-width-for-pdf-table.title: Set Minimum Column Width for PDF Table
set-minimum-column-width-for-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a tagged table in a PDF and enforce a minimum column width by setting the DefaultColumnWidth property using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-table-with-max-column-widths.title: Create PDF Table with Maximum Column Widths
create-pdf-table-with-max-column-widths.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document containing a table whose columns have maximum widths defined in points, with header styling and word‑wrap for cell content.

add-auto-numbered-column-to-pdf-table.title: Add Auto‑Numbered Column to PDF Table
add-auto-numbered-column-to-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF, insert sequential numbers into the first cell of each row, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-background-color-opacity.title: Add Table Background Color with Opacity
add-table-background-color-opacity.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF table and setting its BackgroundColor using Color.FromArgb to apply a semi‑transparent color.

add-gradient-background-to-table.title: Add Gradient Background to Table
add-gradient-background-to-table.description: Demonstrates how to apply a linear gradient brush as the background of a table in a PDF.

add-table-to-pdf-shadow-effect.title: Add Table to PDF and Explain Shadow Effect Limitation
add-table-to-pdf-shadow-effect.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a table with header and data rows, adds it to the page, and notes that Aspose.Pdf.Table does not support a native ShadowEffect property.

set-table-z-index-in-pdf.title: Set Table Z-Index in PDF
set-table-z-index-in-pdf.description: Shows how to add a table to a PDF page and control its overlapping order by setting the Table.ZIndex property using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-to-textbox-form-field.title: Add Tagged Table Inside a TextBox Form Field
add-table-to-textbox-form-field.description: Demonstrates creating a TextBox form field, building a tagged table with the logical structure API, attaching the table to the PDF's structure, and setting the field's appearance to display the table.

add-table-as-paragraph-to-pdf.title: Insert Table as Paragraph in PDF
add-table-as-paragraph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, add a text fragment, create a Table object, populate it with rows and cells, and insert the table as a paragraph on the page using Aspose.Pdf.

import-datatable-images-table.title: Import DataTable with Images into PDF Table
import-datatable-images-table.description: Demonstrates creating a DataTable containing image bytes, importing the data into a PDF table, and rendering the images inside table cells.

render-table-high-dpi-images.title: Render Table with High‑DPI Images
render-table-high-dpi-images.description: Creates a PDF containing a table where each cell holds a high‑resolution image, then saves the document as HTML with increased image DPI using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-report-multiple-tables.title: Create PDF Report with Multiple Tables from DataTables
pdf-report-multiple-tables.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF report containing several tables, each populated from a separate DataTable.

create-pdf-table-dynamic-row-count.title: Create PDF Table with Dynamic Row Count
create-pdf-table-dynamic-row-count.description: Shows how to count source records in a DataTable and import the data into an Aspose.Pdf Table, producing a PDF whose table size adapts to the number of rows.

conditional-formatting-table-cells.title: Conditional Formatting of Table Cells in PDF
conditional-formatting-table-cells.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table, populating it with numeric data, and applying a background color to cells whose values exceed a defined threshold.

render-rotated-table.title: Render Rotated Table Using Transformation Matrix
render-rotated-table.description: Demonstrates how to rotate an entire table 90 degrees by applying a transformation matrix to the page before adding the table.

detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.title: Detect Merged Cells in PDF Tables using TableAbsorber
detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.description: Loads a PDF, extracts tables with TableAbsorber, and checks each cell's ColSpan and RowSpan (via reflection) to determine if the table contains merged cells.

replace-merged-table-cells.title: Replace Merged Table Cells with Separate Cells in PDF
replace-merged-table-cells.description: Demonstrates how to detect a table with merged cells in a PDF, split those cells into individual columns, and replace the original table with a newly constructed one using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footnote-references-in-table-cells.title: Add Footnote References in Table Cells
add-footnote-references-in-table-cells.description: Demonstrates how to insert superscript footnote markers in table cells using TextFragment.FootNote, and automatically generate footnote paragraphs at the end of a PDF document.

insert-table-at-specific-position.title: Insert Table at Specific Position in PDF
insert-table-at-specific-position.description: Shows how to place a table at absolute X and Y coordinates on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified document.

right-align-table-pdf.title: Right Align Table in PDF
right-align-table-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to align a table to the right margin of a PDF page by setting HorizontalAlignment to Right and adjusting the left margin, with platform‑aware saving.

set-table-border-thickness.title: Set Table Border Thickness in PDF
set-table-border-thickness.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a table and configure the table and its cells to have a 2‑point border using Aspose.Pdf's BorderInfo.

add-double-border-table.title: Add Double Border to Table in PDF
add-double-border-table.description: Creates a PDF, adds a table and applies a double border style with a specified width.

add-multiline-text-cell.title: Add Multiline Text to Table Cell using TextFragments
add-multiline-text-cell.description: Demonstrates how to create a table cell with multiline text by adding multiple TextFragment objects separated by line‑break fragments.

add-list-inside-table-cell.title: Add List Inside Table Cell in PDF
add-list-inside-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a table, and insert a bullet list inside a cell using Paragraphs.

add-numbered-list-in-cell.title: Add Numbered List Inside a Table Cell
add-numbered-list-in-cell.description: Demonstrates how to create a numbered list inside a PDF table cell using Aspose.PDF tagged PDF structures.

extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Tables to CSV using TableAbsorber
extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber, iterate through rows and cells, and write the extracted data to CSV files.

extract-pdf-tables-to-datatable.title: Extract PDF Tables to DataTable with TableAbsorber
extract-pdf-tables-to-datatable.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF, convert each table into a System.Data.DataTable, and output the extracted content.

set-fixed-row-height-in-pdf-table.title: Set Fixed Row Height in PDF Table
set-fixed-row-height-in-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, add rows, and assign a fixed height to a specific row.

auto-fit-row-height.title: Auto-fit Row Height in PDF Table
auto-fit-row-height.description: Demonstrates how to let a table row automatically adjust its height to fit its content by not fixing the row height.

set-fixed-row-height.title: Set Fixed Row Height for Table Rows
set-fixed-row-height.description: Demonstrates how to set a fixed row height for all rows of a table by configuring the Table.DefaultRowHeight property before adding rows.

set-page-orientation-landscape-table.title: Set Page Orientation to Landscape for Wide Table
set-page-orientation-landscape-table.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF page to landscape orientation before adding a wide table so that the table fits within the page boundaries.

rotate-pdf-page-add-table.title: Rotate PDF Page and Insert a Table
rotate-pdf-page-add-table.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page 90 degrees clockwise and then add a formatted table with borders and text using Aspose.Pdf.

detect-tables-on-rotated-pdf-pages.title: Detect Tables on Rotated PDF Pages with TableAbsorber
detect-tables-on-rotated-pdf-pages.description: Iterates through each PDF page, checks its rotation angle, and uses TableAbsorber to locate and count tables regardless of page orientation.

remove-tables-containing-keyword.title: Remove Tables Containing a Keyword from PDF
remove-tables-containing-keyword.description: Demonstrates how to scan each table in a PDF for a specific keyword and delete the entire table if the keyword is found, then save the modified document.
